programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: Jaded designer Lauren decides to move back home after three years trying to make her career in Seattle. Lauren soon finds out that the city has more to offer then she could have imagined. (2020)

programme.title: Fashionably In Love
programme.desc: New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2022)

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: Single Dad and TV chef Will needs food publicist Becky to clean up his image. Can she transform the lazy chef into her very own dream dash? (2020)

programme.title: Love On The Rise
programme.desc: A baker mistakes a wealthy bachelor for a waiter and the two quickly fall in love, not realizing his company is trying to evict her bakery. Starring Katrina Norman (2020)

programme.title: Clairevoyant
programme.desc: A yoga-practicing girl hires a TV crew to document her journey to enlightenment to self-discovery, comparing the past, her painful present, and the unspiritual scene in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The 4th
programme.desc: It's the 4th of July in Los Angeles, when Jamie, an illustrator who can barely pay his rent, tries to throw a party while his bully roommate is out of town. But everything seems to go wrong.

programme.title: Gatlopp: Hell of a Game
programme.desc: Jumanji meets Escape Room. It's going to be one hell of a game. Four friends reunite for game night to forget the trauma of adult life. With mischief, booze and mayhem on the cards, are they playing the game or is the game playing them?

programme.title: Super Fuzz
programme.desc: Stricken by radiation, an agent acquires superpowers with which he breaks up a gang of counterfeiters who print bills on a fishing boat that he disposes of along with frozen fish. Among the superpowers are bullets stopped with his teeth.

programme.title: R.A.D.A.R.: The Adventures of the Bionic Dog
programme.desc: A boy and his dog with bionic powers save a small town from two bumbling crooks.

programme.title: Maya the Bee: The Golden Orb
programme.desc: When a bored Maya and Willi bust out of winter lockdown early, they are catapulted headfirst into a top secret mission! Entrusted with the care of a sacred seed, Maya and Willi team up with their old pal's Arnie and Barnie to deliver the seed to its new home atop the mysterious Bonsai Mountain.

programme.title: Firehouse Dog
programme.desc: Hollywood's most pampered pooch gets lost during a commercial shoot and ends up as the mascot for a local fire station.

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: Join beloved house pets Bella the cat, Bagel the dog, and the always-feisty Alvin the parrot, for another fun and fact-filled afternoon in front of the TV screen watching their favorite show: Pets! When these three buddies are on the couch itʼs always a madcap and memorable time!

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Heidi is based on the novel by Johanna Spyri. The film follows the adventures of Heidi, a young orphan girl, whose gift for happiness helps her when she is forced to leave the mountains for a new life in the city.

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: A former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law. Starring Scarlett Johansson (2005)

programme.title: Meteor Storm
programme.desc: (2010) Sci-fi action adventure starring Kari Matchett. An astronomer works to save the city of San Francisco from total annihilation when a once-in-a-lifetime celestial event turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: NYC: Tornado Terror
programme.desc: (2008) Disaster film starring Sebastian Spence. When a deadly jet stream vortex unleashes tornadoes over Manhattan, a race begins to stop the storm before the city is torn apart.

programme.title: Cops Uncut
programme.desc: Be part of the action and witness everything from high speed pursuits to near misses captured on dashcam by Highway Patrol Officers.

programme.title: Cops Uncut
programme.desc: Be part of the action and witness everything from high speed pursuits to near misses captured on dashcam by Highway Patrol Officers.

programme.title: Cops Uncut
programme.desc: Be part of the action and witness everything from high speed pursuits to near misses captured on dashcam by Highway Patrol Officers.

programme.title: Nocebo
programme.desc: A fashion designer (Eva Green) suffers from a mysterious illness that confounds her doctors and frustrates her husband (Mark Strong) - until help arrives in the form of a Filipino nanny (Chai Fonacier) who uses traditional folk healing to reveal a horrifying truth.

programme.title: The Captor
programme.desc: Fact is stronger than fiction in this furiously thrilling crime caper based on the absurd but true story of the 1973 bank heist and hostage crisis, starring Ethan Hawke and Noomi Rapace and from the executive producer of BlackKkKlansman.

programme.title: High Heat
programme.desc: When the local mafia shows up to burn down her restaurant, Ana, a chef with a meticulous past, defends her turf and proves her knife skills both in and out of the kitchen.

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: A man dies as part of an experimental military program. A former black-ops soldier takes his place to find who killed him.

programme.title: Programming will resume shortly
programme.desc: We're catching up on our beauty sleep! Stay tuned for more priceless entertainment curated by Rakuten TV.

programme.title: Waiting for Anya
programme.desc: From the mind of world-renowned author Michael Morpurgo comes the cinematic adaptation of Waiting for Anya - a powerful and authentic true story of a young shepherd that had a key part to play in one of the world's most shocking moments in history.

programme.title: Berlin I Love You
programme.desc: Latest instalment of the Cities of Love series (Paris, je t'aime / New York, I Love You / Rio, Eu Te Amo), this collective feature film is made of ten stories of romance set in the German capital.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a big breakup, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away. And she doesn't even like yoga! But maybe the universe has put her here for a reason, because the handsome loner staying at the lodge turns out to be Stefan Gonzales, the tech guru at the center of the scandal. As she gains his trust to expose him, she finds herself falling in love with him. Now she must use the lessons from yoga to choose: the perfect story or the perfect man?

programme.title: Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: مضطرين للعمل معًا ، يتعلم مخطط الزفاف ومخطط الحدث أن المتناقضات يمكن أن تنتج أكثر النتائج غير المتوقعة.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries
programme.sub-title: S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: 回憶威爾士的戴安娜公主包括她國葬的場景和她親密朋友們的感人言辭。這是一個對戴安娜的溫暖而深思的看法，既是作為一個人，也是作為一個公共人物：那位從未成為女王的公主，和將永遠被銘記的公主。

programme.title: Get Shorty
programme.desc: Golden Globe® winner John Travolta stars with Gene Hackman, Danny DeVito and Rene Russo in this wildly popular comedy of a gangster who turns into a big-time producer after he travels to Hollywood to collect a debt from a down-and-out filmmaker.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: A priest from the Vatican is sent to visit a woman who's showing signs of stigmata. The priest comes to find that the lady is truly possessed by something.

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: From the director of The Hills Have Eyes comes the terrifying story of troubled ex-cop who must save his family from an unspeakable evil that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

programme.title: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: The last witch hunter is all that stands between humanity and the most horrifying witches in history.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Hellboy: Sword of Storms
programme.desc: A folklore professor becomes unwittingly possessed by the ancient Japanese demons of Thunder and Lightning.

programme.title: Horns
programme.desc: After his girlfriend's mysterious death, a young man awakens to find strange horns sprouting from his forehead

programme.title: Adventures of a Taxi Driver
programme.desc: Joe likes the ladies and gets to meet a variety of them in his job as a taxi driver. From dizzy young women to frustrated housewives, Joe fancies them all, and they take a fancy to Joe. If only things were smoother at home for the put-upon cabbie. With his nagging mother, thieving teenage brother, and the attentions of an overbearing girlfriend with ideas of marriage, Joe leaves the homestead and rents the spare room at his best mate's flat. Meanwhile, he continues to find himself in an assortment of humorous sexual escapades until he accidentally becomes embroiled in a jewel heist that doesn't quite go to plan.

programme.title: Lady Bloodfight
programme.desc: Jane is a beautiful but troubled American girl backpacking her way through Hong Kong. When she successfully fends off three thugs trying to rob her, it draws the attention of Shu, a Wudang champion, who is impressed by her raw street fighting abilities. Shu recruits Jane and trains her to fight in the vicious, all-female, underground martial arts tournament known as The Kumite.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: In 1978, one film changed the face of cinema forever. Long established as one of the most debated and divisive movies of all time, I Spit On Your Grave has been condemned by some as 'vile and depraved', whilst others hail it as a 'misunderstood masterpiece of cinema', 'the ultimate feminist movie'. Re-experience the phenomenon that shocked and divided the world, and influenced an entire genre and generation of film-makers, with Camille Keaton's portrayal of young writer Jennifer Hills, her horrific plans for revenge, and some of the most gruesomely, unforgettable scenes ever captured to film.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A fast-talking lawyer transforms his body and takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter and has his revenge.

programme.title: The World's Fastest Indian
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins stars as Burt Munro, a man who never let the dreams of youth fade. After a lifetime of perfecting his classic Indian motorcycle, Burt set off from the bottom of the world to test his bike at the Bonneville Salt Flats in Utah. With all the odds against him, he set a new speed record and captured the spirit of his times. Burt Munro's 1967 world record remains unbroken and his legend lives on today.

programme.title: Discarnate
programme.desc: The producer of Independence Day: Resurgence brings you this spine-tingling descent into the supernatural. A grieving neuro-scientist creates a mind-altering serum that reconnects people to the other side. However it unknowingly attracts a more sinister being. This mind-bending horror stars Thomas Kretschmann (King Kong) Josh Stewart (Interstellar) and Bex Taylor-Klaus (TVs Scream).

programme.title: June
programme.desc: Dark. Demonic. Disturbing. Nine-year-old orphan June has been found a new adoptive family. What her new parents do not know is that June is possessed by an ancient dark spirit named Aer. As the evil Aer plans to destroy everything, will June be able to save her new family and herself? In the vein of The Omen and Orphan, this chilling supernatural cult horror is a genre classic and one not to miss.

programme.title: Freehold
programme.desc: Twisted and highly sinister. Hussein, a young amoral London estate agent will do anything to get his commission. His life takes a dramatic turn when he is tormented by an angry ex-client, Orlan (Javier Botet: It) who has claimed Hussein's flat as his, unbeknownst to the estate agent.

programme.title: The Farm
programme.desc: FrightFest Presents. A brutal, gore-tastic slasher/survival horror, in the vein of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre and Wolf Creek. While on a road trip a couple decide to stop at a diner. Little do they know that ordering a hamburger will have terrible consequences. Their journey soon becomes a harrowing story of survival as they are kidnapped by local farmers. On their farm, humans are the main dish.

programme.title: One Small Hitch
programme.desc: A heart-warming romantic comedy in which childhood friends Josh (Shane McCrae: The Help) and Molly (Aubrey Dollar: Failure to Launch) fake their marriage plans for the benefit of the groom's dying father. However, things get out of hand when they find themselves obliged to stage a phoney wedding. When the pretence gives way to real feelings, they have some serious decisions to make!

programme.title: Save the Date
programme.desc: Lizzy Caplan and Alison Brie star in a romantic comedy about 2 very different sisters, and their adventures in love, lust and a race to the altar.

programme.title: Romance in the Wilds
programme.desc: Amid a deadly wildfire, an unexpected romance ignites between a forest ranger and a geologist as they race to escape the flames.

programme.title: Love & Other Drugs
programme.desc: A womanizing Viagra salesman with no sense of direction or responsibility falls in love with a free-spirited woman.

programme.title: Little Manhattan
programme.desc: Little Manhattan is a feel-good comedy that's perfect for kids and adults alike. In a city known for excitement, two young friends are about to embark on the greatest adventure of all.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: "Dance-Off" tells the story of two rival dance studios whose star-crossed lovers, Brandon and Jasmine, must compete against each other for $25,000 and the top award, the Platinum Platinum.

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: Keeping Up With The Kandasamys
programme.desc: Matriarchal rivals of neighboring families, whose young adult children become romantically involved - try despite their best efforts - to keep them apart with hilarious results.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: Jillian inherits a beautiful mountainside cabin after her long-lost, wealthy uncle dies. She plans to sell it, but handsome caretaker Liam makes her an offer she can't refuse, and sparks fly as they work to transform the cabin into a holiday resort.

programme.title: Bridal Fever
programme.desc: It's a literal race to the alter when a steamy romance novelist with a long line of torrid romances – and ex-husbands – sets out to help her editor, a single bachelorette, ditch her bridesmaid gowns once and for all in this romantic comedy.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: Finding Love In Sisters
programme.desc: When her mother dies, Esperanza returns to Sisters, Oregon and reunites with her sisters.

programme.title: Identical Love
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Dr. Charlotte Hudson needs to escape life at home. She signs up to volunteer at a health clinic in a tropical country. But her plans of escaping are thrown off when she comes across her former fiancé's twin brother, Seth (a dentist), who is also volunteering with the clinic. As they spend time together, Seth falls in love with Charlotte, but she struggles to let go of seeing her fiancé every time she looks at Seth. The island romance will help her break free from the past and love Seth for who he is.

programme.title: Eat, Drink And Be Married
programme.desc: Three days from their wedding, Jess and Max are about to call it off. However, Jess starts to question her decision when Max's brother enlists the help of Billie to save the wedding, and in the process starts to fall for her.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: A House on Fire
programme.desc: Deborah had the epitome of a perfect life. But not everything is as it seems.

programme.title: Next Door Nightmare
programme.desc: Sarah and Kyle move next door to a charismatic, but deeply disturbed psychopath.

programme.title: Darren and Chastity / Ryan / Julie
programme.desc: A family is subjected to a vicious attack during a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: A Friend's Obsession
programme.desc: After Megan's fiancé is killed, Lloyd follows her to win her love, but her new boyfriend stands in the way.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Vicki looks into several murders in an affluent neighborhood.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: Wish You Were Dead
programme.desc: Hayley Udall tries to make ends meet for herself and her 14 year-old daughter while providing alimony for a horrible ex-husband. She wishes her problems with her ex could go away, and upon venting her frustrations one night, finds herself tangled up in a pact with two people (Melanie and Kevin) to “eliminate” each other's problems.

programme.title: The Bad Son
programme.desc: An elusive serial killer is killing innocent women in Seattle. The police and FBI are on the killer's trail but were never prepared to face a bizarre twist in the case.

programme.title: Gigli
programme.desc: When small time street thug Larry Gigli meets a tough and gorgeous enforcer named Ricki, the sparks fly in this outrageous battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: The Star Packer
programme.desc: A gang working for The Shadow is terrorizing the town. John Travers decides to take on the job of sheriff and do something about it.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California.

programme.title: Tulsa
programme.desc: In Tulsa, after a rancher dies during a feud with a major oil company, his daughter, driven by revenge, starts digging for oil herself.

programme.title: You're Jinxed, Friend You've Met Sacramento
programme.desc: This fast-moving tale revolves around the kidnaping of a boxer's daughter. The boxer pays the ransom money but the girl is still not released. Her boyfriend decides to get her back his own way, killing her ruthless captor in a fierce duel.

programme.title: Passage Home
programme.desc: ‚ÄòLucky Ryland‚Äô is the captain of the ‚ÄòBulinga‚Äô ship. He secures a contract to transport a cargo of pedigree bulls from South America to England which must be done in record time.

programme.title: Comedy Man
programme.desc: A middle aged provincial actor finds fame and some fortune when in desperation he manages to land himself the main role in a deodorant commercial. A satirical comedy.

programme.title: A Window in London
programme.desc: A man who witnesses a murder through the windows of a passing train tries to track down the killer.

programme.title: Some Girls Do
programme.desc: Comedy spy film starring Richard Johnson and Daliah Lavi.

programme.title: Delayed Action
programme.desc: Ned is on the verge of committing suicide. When a criminal offers him a false identity Ned accepts and pretends to be the head of a criminal organisation. He realises there is a dark side to the syndicate when a young man kills himself.

programme.title: Passionate Summer
programme.desc: An idealistic young schoolmaster arrives at a Jamaican boarding school.

programme.title: Killing Talk
programme.desc: Jae-pil, who runs a karaoke, has been receiving anonymous blackmails. One day, he gets into a fight with his friend Dae-hyun and ends up knocking him unconscious. Then he receives another text. It says the blackmailer will release the video of him killing Dae-hyun if he refuses to follow his orders. The order is to find one of his customers, Choi Sang- cheol, and kill him in time.

programme.title: Idol Recipe (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: He squanders a dream-like opportunity and 1 billion won in cash in just one night. Instead, he must protect the idol group "Bella," which is like a doppelganger! Here's the problem: he has absolutely no recollection of last night's actions! In this mind-boggling situation, Jae-sung begins retracing the steps of the vanished memories and money from the previous night... The dream recipe for creating a K-POP idol is now revealed!"15-year veteran idol manager" Bae Jae-sung, whose passion has completely cooled down.

programme.title: I AM HERE (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: He returned to the front lines of investigation and was tracking down a serial killer Kyu-jong. In the process, he finds out through the donation coordinator Ah-seung that Kyu-jong got an organ transplant from the same donor as himself and that the donor was a murderer he arrested himself in the past... Seon-du, the police investigator was once stabbed in his lungs while hunting down a murderer but was miraculously brought back to life through an organ transplant. A hot-blooded investigator vs. an outraged murderer. The extreme chase between two men entangled in cruel fate begins!

programme.title: BAIT (English Dubbed)
programme.desc: After the encounter, Joo-young can't stand Hyuk-soo anymore as he even threatens her students. She decides to disclose who he really is and starts a new plan with a helper…suicide. Living as a high school curling teacher, she accidentally meets Hyuk-soo, the coach related to her teammate's To Joo-young, Korea's first Olympic gold medalist in women's curling and the skip (captain) of the team, the Olympic medal was everything. She quits curling with a sense of responsibility and guilt after her teammate's suicide.

programme.title: Ten Months
programme.desc: Mi-rae a twentysomething game engineer finds out that the hangover was actually her body being pregnant.

programme.title: Fourth Place
programme.desc: Junho a 11-year-old swimmer always records 4th place at all the swimming contests. His mom is more frustrated than himself in winning as she believes swimming is the only way for him to become successful. One day she manages to hire a personal coach who once was the most promising athlete on the national team. But he trains Junho the only way he knows how to use violence

programme.title: The Silenced
programme.desc: With her class mates' mysterious disappearances Ju-ran gets involved with her school's dark secrets.

programme.title: Urban Myths
programme.desc: 10 different urban tales will take you into the realm of darkness where myth and reality become blurred.

programme.title: Devil's Gate (Abduction)
programme.desc: Set in the small town of Devil's Gate, North Dakota, the film examines the disappearance of a local woman and her young son. Schull plays an FBI agent who helps the local sheriff search for answers.

programme.title: Archenemy
programme.desc: Max Fist, who claims to be a hero from another dimension who fell through time and space to earth, where he has no powers.No one believes his stories except for a local teen named Hamster.

programme.title: Lost Solace
programme.desc: Spence Cutler never felt empathy or guilt. However, a fateful encounter with a new drug is about to give him a dose of too much reality, and he takes a mind-bending trip down the psychedelic highway of consciousness to come face to face with his own morality and his own twisted soul.

programme.title: Strawberry Mansion
programme.desc: In the near future an unassuming dream tax auditor gets swept up in a cosmic journey through the life and dreams of an ageing eccentric.

programme.title: Deadly Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: (2011) Identity-switch thriller with Charisma Carpenter. When an accident leaves her twin in a coma, Callie sees an opportunity to evade a drug charge by taking her place. But not everyone is fooled..

programme.title: Cries In The Dark
programme.desc: (2006) Crime drama with Eva LaRue. When a detective's pregnant sister vanishes, she's on the hunt to find her. But in this race against time, desperation can turn deadly.

programme.desc: In 2001, Robert Altman (MASH, The Long Goodbye) took the unexpected step into Agatha Christie territory with Gosford Park, a murder-mystery whodunit set in an English country house starring a host of British acting greats and with an Oscar-winning screenplay by Downton Abbey creator Julian Fellowes.

He finds himself a target for some of LA's most dangerous men after agreeing to aid the husband of his beautiful neighbour.

programme.title: Nothing But The Truth
programme.desc: Nothing but the Truth is an edge-of-your-seat political thriller starring Kate Beckinsale, Vera Farmiga and Matt Dillon. Washington DC political journalist Rachel Armstrong writes an explosive story about a government scandal in which she reveals the name of a covert CIA agent.

programme.title: Fair Game
programme.desc: FAIR GAME is a riveting action-thriller based on the autobiography of real-life undercover CIA operative VALERIE PLAME (Naomi Watts), whose career was destroyed and marriage strained to its limits when her covert identity was exposed by a politically motivated press leak.

programme.title: Relic Hunter

programme.title: Wire Room
programme.desc: Bruce Willis stars in this explosive thriller as a federal agent caught in chaos when a rookie in Homeland Security's Wire Room crosses a cartel arms dealer. With corrupt cops, a rogue guard, and a deadly SWAT team closing in, they must fight to survive and expose a conspiracy.

programme.title: Tiger House
programme.desc: When Kelly sneaks into her boyfriend's house one night, she soon discovers she isn't the only unwelcome visitor. A violent gang – lead by determined boss Shane have invaded the property and are holding the family hostage for an unknown ransom.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world.

programme.title: The Twisters
programme.desc: Dozens of deadly tornadoes converge in the Midwest, merging into a mega twister set to obliterate everything for hundreds of miles.
